title: Asphalt Seal Coating & Repair - Elite South Texas
content:
Asphalt Seal Coating and Repair
Asphalt seal coating and repair are essential for maintaining the longevity, safety, and appearance of paved surfaces. Over time, asphalt is exposed to harsh weather conditions, UV rays, water, and chemicals such as oil and gasoline, which can weaken its structure and cause cracks, potholes, and erosion. Seal coating with a two-component resinous systems verses a conventional asphalt sealing coating emulsion creates a protective barrier that shields the asphalt from these damaging elements, preventing premature wear and extending its lifespan. Additionally, timely repairs address small cracks and imperfections before they worsen, reducing the need for costly replacements. Beyond functionality, seal coating enhances the aesthetic appeal of asphalt by restoring its smooth, black finish, contributing to a well-maintained and professional look for driveways, parking lots, and roads.
Advantages
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Resistant to damage from water, de-icing salt, and petrochemicals
Extreme temperature resistances including freeze/thaw conditions and extreme heat
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair
Options for line striping, directional arrows and safety markings
Polymer Modified Cement
Polymer Modified Cement Brochure
Parking garages
Elevator lobbies
Stairwells and ramps
Supply, utility, and mechanical rooms
